solution:  
```java
class Solution {
    public int hammingWeight(int n) {
        int count = 0;
        while (n != 0) {
            n &= (n - 1); // Clear the least significant set bit
            count++;
        }
        return count;
    }
}
```  
efficiency: HIGH  
time complexity: O(1)  
space complexity: O(1)  
energy implications: LOW  
explanation: The solution uses Brian Kernighan’s algorithm to count set bits by repeatedly clearing the least significant set bit until the number becomes zero. This method is efficient as it only iterates as many times as there are set bits, which is optimal for binary operations.
